background_prompt: A scenic landscape features a modern green - and - blue train traveling through a vineyard (rows of green vines, wooden stakes). A historic stone castle stands by a turquoise lake, with mountain ranges (dark green peaks, rolling hills) in the background. The sky is partly cloudy (white - gray clouds, blue sky). The style is realistic, emphasizing natural beauty and man - made structures in harmony.
editing_prompt: The front carriage of the train stretches along the tracks, adding length. The green - blue color scheme and sleek design stay consistent, with the new section matching existing carriages.
